steps.title: Apply the Pythagorean theorem
steps.content:
The legs are $13$ centimeters and $8$ centimeters. For hypotenuse $c$:
$$
c^2=13^2+8^2
$$

steps.title: Solve for the hypotenuse
steps.content: Evaluate the squares and take the square root: $$ c^2=169+64=233 $$ So $$ c=\sqrt{233} $$ The answer is B.
